card.title: Rapamycin (Sirolimus)
card.description: Rapamycin is a promising therapy for promoting healthspan by modulating the mTOR complex I pathway, which plays a key role in cellular aging. When taken in small doses over time, Rapamycin may aid in cellular function, slowing the accumulation of senescent cells and promoting longevity.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...
